info.name: AssetFlow Enterprise API
info.description: Complete Postman collection for AssetFlow — covers Auth, Users, Departments, Categories, Assets, Allocations, Transfers, Bookings, Maintenance, Audit Cycles, Reports, and Notifications. Auto-scripts inject tokens and IDs between requests.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Dell Laptop XPS 15",
  "category_id": "{{categoryId}}",
  "serial_number": "SN-DELL-001",
  "acquisition_date": "2024-01-15",
  "acquisition_cost": 85000,
  "condition": "excellent",
  "location": "HQ Floor 2 - Desk E12",
  "department_id": "{{departmentId}}",
  "is_bookable": false,
  "notes": "Assigned to engineering pool",
  "custom_fields": { "warranty_months": 24, "brand": "Dell" }
}

{
  "name": "Conference Room B2",
  "category_id": "{{categoryId}}",
  "serial_number": null,
  "acquisition_date": "2020-01-01",
  "condition": "good",
  "location": "HQ Building B - Floor 2",
  "department_id": "{{departmentId}}",
  "is_bookable": true,
  "notes": "10-person capacity, projector included"
}

item.name: Book a Resource Slot (valid – no overlap)
Book a Resource Slot (conflict test – 9:30–10:30 overlaps 9–10)
Book a Resource Slot (valid – starts right after previous: 10:00–11:00)
Approve Maintenance Request (Admin/AM) – asset → Under Maintenance
Start Maintenance Work (Admin/AM) – status → In Progress
Close Audit Cycle (Admin/AM) – locks cycle + updates asset statuses
Assets Due for Maintenance / Nearing Retirement
Asset Usage – Most Used vs Idle Assets
